locations.name: 卡尔·林奈
locations.summary: 卡尔·冯·林奈（瑞典語：Carl von Linné；1707年5月23日—1778年1月10日），也譯為林内、林耐，原名卡尔·林奈乌斯（Carl Linnaeus），瑞典生物学家，瑞典科学院创始人兼第一任主席。林奈奠定了现代生物学命名法…

locations.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省
locations.summary: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省（西班牙語：Buenos Aires）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，是阿根廷二十四个自治省份（estados autogobernados）之一或者一级司法管辖权（jurisdicciones de primer orde…

locations.name: Gallery forest
locations.summary: A gallery forest is one formed as a corridor along rivers or wetlands, projecting into landscapes that are otherwise on…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

locations.name: Caatinga
locations.summary: Caatinga (; [kaaˈt͡ʃĩɡɐ]) is a type of semi-arid tropical vegetation, and an ecoregion characterized by this vegetation…

locations.name: 大查科
locations.summary: 大查科（西班牙語：Gran Chaco，直译：「大獵場」），又译作大厦谷，是南美洲中部的冲积平原。这个地名是由西班牙语“Gran”（大的）和瓜拉尼语“Chaco”（狩猎场）组成。 概述 大查科位于安第斯山脉以东，巴拉圭河－巴拉那河以西，亚…

locations.name: 奥里诺科河
locations.summary: 奥里诺科河（西班牙語：Río Orinoco），是南美洲主要河流之一，全长2,410公里，流域面积88万平方公里。南美洲第三大河，仅次于亚马孙河及巴拉那河。 語源學 这条河的名字源于哇撈語的“划船之地”一词，其本身也源于güiri（划船）…

relations.subject: Purple-throated euphonia
relations.evidence: The purple-throated euphonia (Euphonia chlorotica) is a species of bird in the family Fringillidae, the finches and euphonias. It is found in every mainland South American country except Chile, though in French Guiana only as a vagrant.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Purple-throated euphonia
relations.evidence: chlorotica west into southeastern Bolivia and south through Paraguay, far northern Uruguay, and northern and central Argentina to northern Buenos Aires Province The purple-throated euphonia inhabits several quite different landscapes, though in all it is primarily either outside of forest or on its edges, and infrequently in the canopy of the forest interior

relations.subject: Purple-throated euphonia
relations.evidence: Along the upper tributaries of the Amazon in Peru and along the main stem it occurs in river-edge forest, on river islands, and in nearby "inland" clearings with some tall trees. It occurs around the edges of the Pampas del Heath savanna. Elsewhere it occurs in dry to humid woodlands, gallery forest, secondary forest, mangroves, caatinga and chaco scrublands, and cerrado. In Venezuela it reaches an elevation of north of the Orinoco River and south of it. It reaches in Colombia{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M
